data.title: Porvenir, Colombia's largest pension fund manager, launches crypto investment portfolio.
data.description: Porvenir, Colombia's largest pension fund manager, has launched a crypto investment portfolio that allows members to indirectly gain exposure to Bitcoin prices by investing in the BlackRock Bitcoin ETF (IBIT). The product has a minimum investment of 100,000 Colombian pesos (approximately US$25), is open to savers aged 18 to 45, is only available within the voluntary pension system, and requires personalized risk assessment consultation. (CriptoNoticias)

data.title: Whale Faces Major Liquidation Amid Market Downturn
data.description:
On April 28, a significant on-chain liquidation event was reported. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a whale who had taken a long position with 4,500 ETH faced six consecutive liquidations, totaling approximately $4.91 million, marking the largest liquidation address of the day. The address still holds a long position valued at about $9.55 million.

The details of the liquidation are as follows: 1,620 ETH were liquidated, valued at approximately $3.67 million, with a remaining position of $6.62 million and a liquidation price of $2,250. Additionally, 10.8 BTC were liquidated, valued at approximately $830,000, with a remaining position of $1.48 million and a liquidation price of $70,020. Furthermore, 99,000 HYPE tokens were liquidated, valued at approximately $410,000, with a remaining position of $1.46 million and a liquidation price of $37.45.

The address initially opened a 25x leveraged long position on ETH last Monday and continued to roll over the position throughout the week. On the morning of the previous day, the whale added another 500 ETH to the position. However, two rounds of market downturns occurred overnight, resulting in a combined loss of approximately $610,000 across three long positions.

The address in question is 0xe1d3baa26d94f53897efbeb550d95cc2ab72d5f7.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 77,000 USDT with a 2.82% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 28, 2026, 02:31 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 77,000 USDT and is now trading at 76,998.65625 USDT, with a narrowed 2.82% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Hyperliquid Platform Whale Positions Reach $3.45 Billion
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass reveals that a whale on the Hyperliquid platform currently holds positions valued at $3.45 billion. The long positions amount to $1.72 billion, representing 49.78% of the total, while short positions are at $1.73 billion, accounting for 50.22%. The long positions have an unrealized loss of $22.003 million, and the short positions have an unrealized loss of $11.2292 million.

Notably, a whale address, 0x0ddf..02, has taken a 3x leveraged short position on Bitcoin at a price of $67,992.1, with an unrealized loss of $9.0579 million.

data.title: South Korea's First Bank-Led KRW Stablecoin Ecosystem Underway
data.description: iM Bank is developing South Korea's inaugural bank-led KRW stablecoin ecosystem as part of its digital finance expansion following its transition to a nationwide commercial bank. According to NS3.AI, the bank is collaborating with fintech company Finger and blockchain expert Validator to establish the token's distribution framework. The initiative will incorporate post-quantum cryptography to enhance security.

data.title: Polymarket Account Makes Significant Bet on Timberwolves for Game 5
data.description: A Polymarket account, which has incurred losses surpassing $5.5 million, recently invested approximately $150,000 in the Timberwolves -11.5 position for Game 5. According to NS3.AI, the average entry price for this position was 49¢, while it was trading at 49.5¢. Minnesota currently leads Denver 3–1, with Game 5 scheduled to take place on Denver's home court.

data.title: An account that had lost over $5.5 million purchased $150,000 worth of NBA Western Conference First Round Game 5, with the Timberwolves as 11.5-point underdogs against the Nuggets.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in Polymarket's prediction event for "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 5 Timberwolves vs. Nuggets," an account that lost over $5.5 million purchased approximately $150,000 worth of Timberwolves +11.5 points, with an average opening price of 49¢ and a current price of 49.5¢. The Timberwolves currently lead the Nuggets 3-1 in the NBA Western Conference First Round, and Game 5 will be played at the Nuggets' home court. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: China's Employment Remains Stable in Early 2026
data.description: China's employment situation has remained stable in the first quarter of 2026, according to Jin10. The Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security reported that 2.99 million new jobs were created in urban areas from January to March. The average surveyed unemployment rate in urban areas stood at 5.3%, indicating overall stability in the job market. (CCTV News)

data.title: Machi Brother's $79.16 million long positions turned from profit to loss.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), Machi Big Brother's $79.16 million long positions have turned from profit to loss, after previously showing a floating profit of over $2.7 million. Specifically, the 555 BTC long positions were worth $42.76 million, currently showing a floating profit of $456,000; the 15,600 ETH long positions were worth $35.85 million, showing a floating loss of $486,000; and the 12,888.88 HYPE long positions were worth $533,000, showing a floating profit of $4,797.

data.title: Lummis stated his plan to push for the CLARITY Act to enter the review process in May, asserting that Bitcoin is a truly free currency.
data.description: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis stated at the "Bitcoin 2026" conference that she plans to push the "CLARITY Act" into the review process in May and ultimately implement it, establishing a comprehensive regulatory framework for the U.S. crypto market. Lummis also stated that Bitcoin, with its characteristics of requiring no trusted third party and having a limited total supply, is a "truly free currency," and believes the United States should become the global core of this asset.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally retreated, with BTC falling below $78,000; only the NFT sector rose.
data.description: On April 28th, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market generally saw a pullback. The Meme sector fell 3.45% in the past 24 hours, with SPX6900 (SPX) down 6.73% and MemeCore (M) down 14.74%. However, Pump.fun (PUMP) bucked the trend, rising 4.14%. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 2.51% before falling below $78,000, while Ethereum (ETH) fell 3.71%, dropping to around $2,300. Notably, only the NFT sector rose 2.29%, with Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) up 10.01% and SuperVerse (SUPER) up 3.74%. In other sectors, the DeFi sector fell 1.72% in the last 24 hours, with Jupiter (JUP) rising 5.35% within the sector; the CeFi sector fell 1.78%, with Aster (ASTER) falling 2.72%; the Layer 1 sector fell 2.31%, with Solana (SOL) falling 2.95%; the PayFi sector fell 2.91%, with SafePal (SFP) rising 2.39% intraday; and the Layer 2 sector fell 3.13%, with Starknet (STRK) falling 5.45%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance show that ssiNFT, ssiRWA, and ssiSocialFi indices rose 4.64%, 19.6%, and 0.04%, respectively.

data.title: Whale Sells Significant HYPE Holdings for USDC
data.description:
On April 28, a notable transaction was detected involving the cryptocurrency whale known as tummy.hl. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the whale sold 50,000 HYPE tokens at an average price of $41.43, receiving 2.07 million USDC in return.

Following this sale, the wallet still retains 100,000 HYPE tokens, which are valued at approximately $4.16 million based on current market prices.

data.title: COSCO Shipping Energy Sees Over 5% Drop in Hong Kong Stocks Post-Earnings
data.description: COSCO Shipping Energy (01138.HK) experienced a decline of over 5% in its Hong Kong stock price following the release of its earnings report. According to Jin10, the company reported a net profit attributable to shareholders of 2.173 billion yuan in the first quarter, marking a year-on-year increase of 206.74%.

data.title: Launch: Porvenir Introduces Crypto Portfolio for Colombian Pension Accounts
data.description: Porvenir has launched a new crypto portfolio for voluntary pension accounts in Colombia, offering indirect exposure to Bitcoin through BlackRock's IBIT. According to NS3.AI, the minimum investment required is COP 100,000, and participants are required to complete a risk profiling process before joining. This move follows similar initiatives by Protección and Skandia, which have also introduced crypto-related products for pension accounts.

data.title: South Korean Man Accused of $78 Million USDT Payment Scheme in Used Car Exports
data.description: South Korean customs authorities in Busan have booked a man without detention for allegedly orchestrating a 108 billion won ($78 million) USDT payment scheme linked to used car exports. According to NS3.AI, the suspect is accused of violating the Foreign Exchange Transactions Act by allegedly collaborating with a used car importer in Uzbekistan. The suspect reportedly earned approximately 130 million won ($94,000) in commission from the scheme.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Maintains $125,000 Bitcoin Target Amid 'Wartime Inflation' Concerns
data.description: Arthur Hayes, speaking at the Bitcoin 2026 conference, highlighted a shift in Bitcoin's market narrative towards 'wartime inflation.' According to NS3.AI, Hayes maintained his target price of $125,000 for Bitcoin. He linked this outlook to rising inflation expectations due to the U.S.-Iran conflict and enhanced liquidity in the banking system.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin narrative shifts to "wartime inflation," target price $125,000
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes stated at the "Bitcoin 2026" conference that the Bitcoin market narrative is shifting from "AI deflation" to "wartime inflation," and reiterated his bullish view on Bitcoin, setting a target price of $125,000. Hayes believes the Iraq War is fueling expectations of inflation and credit expansion, while improved liquidity in the banking system will offset the credit contraction caused by AI. He also stated that his liquidity metrics bottomed out last November and are moving in tandem with Bitcoin's price action.

data.title: Crypto Enthusiasts Transition to AI and Stablecoin Payments
data.description: A group of former crypto enthusiasts is quietly integrating into traditional finance and technology sectors by shifting their focus to AI, real-world asset tokenization (RWA), and stablecoin payments. According to PANews, these individuals, once known for their aggressive stance on cryptocurrencies, are now exploring new avenues within the financial and technological landscapes. This transition marks a significant change in their approach, as they seek to leverage emerging technologies and stable financial instruments to bridge the gap between the digital and traditional worlds.

data.title: Japan's Finance Minister Warns of Forex Market Intervention Ahead of BOJ Decision
data.description:
Japan's Finance Minister Satuki Katayama has issued a warning to speculators, stating that authorities are prepared to respond to forex market fluctuations at any time. According to Jin10, this announcement comes just hours before the Bank of Japan is set to reveal its policy decision. Katayama emphasized the readiness to take decisive action if necessary, and when asked about the government's vigilance during Japan's upcoming Golden Week holiday, she confirmed their preparedness for round-the-clock intervention.

The Bank of Japan is expected to announce its latest interest rate decision shortly, with the market widely anticipating no change. The voting outcome will be closely watched as the market assesses the possibility of a rate hike in June. Governor Kazuo Ueda's remarks at the post-decision press conference will also be scrutinized.

Pricing in the overnight swap market indicates a less than 3% probability of a rate hike on Tuesday, while the likelihood of a June rate increase has risen to 65%. The USD/JPY is currently trading around 159.5, near the level where authorities intervened in the forex market in 2024.
